nodes.name: Rufous-chested tanager
nodes.summary: The rufous-chested tanager (Thlypopsis ornata) is a species of bird in the family Thraupidae. Distribution and habitat It is found in Ecuador, Peru and southwestern Colombia. Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical moist montane forests, subtropical or tropical high-altitude shrubland, and heavily degraded former forest. References
